title: Golden Glazed Australian Rice Pilaf
description: A vibrant and juicy dish featuring a harmonious blend of rice, jocheong, and infuse oil, perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired meal.

ingredients.name: Rice syrup
ingredients.notes: Similar to honey or golden syrup

ingredients.name: Infuse oil
ingredients.notes: Olive or grapeseed oil infused with garlic and herbs

instructions: Heat 10ml of infuse oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add the Korean jocheong and rice syrup, stirring constantly for 1-2 minutes.
Add the long-grain Australian rice and stir for 2-3 minutes until the grains are coated in the sweet paste.
Add 500ml of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the water has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes, still covered.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley and grated lemon zest.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
